summary: Added 'ralph contribute' CLI command — the highest-leverage autonomous star conversion repair. Bridges the 1,300 PyPI downloads/month → 0 Codeberg star gap by giving every Ralph Workflow user a one-command path to star/fork the project.

changes.modified_readme: README.md (added ralph contribute row to demo table)

behavior: Opens https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow in default browser. Safe webbrowser.open() with graceful fallback.

hold_window_context.note: active_loop_prompt_repair and post_hold_reentry_contract_repair exist only in archive from May 24-25 — not regenerated per cron rules

rationale: star_conversion_agent.py has recommended this exact action across multiple runs
48 PyPI downloads/day with 0 star conversion is the core adoption bottleneck
All 7 external distribution lanes structurally blocked (Reddit IP, gh auth missing, human-gated, PyPI creds)
This is a concrete runtime/process repair with code changes — preferred over another prompt tweak
Every future Ralph Workflow user will see this command in --help output
expected_impact: Low per-invocation but high cumulative — every pip install/pyproject.toml user who runs ralph --help or reads the README sees the star path. Also referenceable in future distribution materials.
